Home › All calculators

All 112 calculators

Every free tool on FinCalc Lab, grouped by topic. Each one runs entirely in your browser, shows the formula it uses, and explains what the result means.

No calculators match — try another word.

Savings & Investing 21

📈 Compound Interest Calculator Project how savings grow with monthly deposits and compounding. 🎯 Savings Goal Calculator Find the exact monthly saving needed to hit a target amount. 🌴 Retirement Savings Calculator Project your nest egg and the income it could support. 📊 Investment Return (CAGR) Calculator Turn a total gain into an honest annualized return. 💹 ROI Calculator Total and annualized return on any investment or project. ⏳ Rule of 72 Calculator Estimate doubling time from an interest or growth rate. 🕐 Present Value Calculator Discount a future sum back to today's dollars. 🪙 Dividend Income Calculator Annual dividend income, yield and reinvested growth. 📐 Simple Interest Calculator Interest on principal only, no compounding. 🏦 CD Calculator Maturity value and interest earned on a CD. 🔁 APY Calculator Turn a nominal rate + compounding into true APY. 📉 Real Rate of Return Calculator What your return is really worth after inflation. 💰 Millionaire Calculator Years to reach $1,000,000 (or any target). 🔮 Future Value Calculator Grow a lump sum plus deposits to a future value. 🪤 Investment Fee Impact Calculator How much a fund's annual fee costs you over time. ☕ Latte Factor Calculator What a small recurring spend could grow to if invested. 🎓 College Savings Calculator Projected education cost and the monthly saving to fund it. ⏱️ Cost of Waiting to Invest Calculator How much delaying investing by a few years really costs. ⏳ Time to Save Calculator How long a monthly amount takes to reach a target. 🎯 Required Return Calculator The annual return needed to reach a target on time. 🪜 CD Ladder Calculator Split a lump sum into a CD ladder: rung schedule, blended APY, and what each year unlocks.

Retirement 13

🏦 401(k) Calculator Project 401(k) growth including the employer match. 💰 Roth IRA Calculator Project tax-free Roth IRA growth from regular contributions. 🏖️ Retirement Withdrawal Calculator How long a nest egg lasts at a given withdrawal. 💵 Annuity Payout Calculator Monthly income a lump sum can pay over a period. 🔥 FIRE Number Calculator Your target nest egg for financial independence. 🏄 Coast FIRE Calculator The amount that grows to retirement with no new savings. 🏛 Social Security Break-Even Calculator Compare claiming at 62, full retirement age or 70 — and the age each choice pays off. ⚖️ Roth vs Traditional 401(k) Calculator Compare after-tax retirement income from pre-tax vs Roth contributions. 🩹 HSA Calculator Project your HSA and see the triple tax advantage vs a 401(k) or taxable account. 📅 RMD Calculator Your required minimum distribution by birth year, plus a year-by-year projection. 🔄 Roth Conversion Calculator Convert at today's tax rate vs staying traditional — final spendable wealth, both ways. 🚨 401(k) Early Withdrawal Calculator Taxes, the 10% penalty, what actually lands in your account — and what the money would have become. 🏛️ Pension Lump Sum vs Annuity Calculator The return your lump sum must earn to match the pension checks — the one number that decides.

Loans & Debt 35

💳 Loan Payment Calculator Monthly payment, total interest and cost of any amortized loan. 🏠 Mortgage Calculator Full monthly housing cost: loan, property tax and insurance. 🚀 Loan Payoff Calculator See how extra monthly payments shorten a loan and cut interest. 🧊 Debt Avalanche vs Snowball Calculator Compare the two classic payoff strategies on your own debts. 🚗 Car Affordability Calculator Turn a monthly budget into a realistic car price. 💳 Credit Card Payoff Calculator How long to clear a card, and what interest costs you. ⚖️ Debt-to-Income (DTI) Calculator The ratio lenders use to approve mortgages and loans. 🔑 House Down Payment Calculator Down payment amount and monthly saving to reach it. 🔄 Mortgage Refinance Calculator Monthly savings and break-even point of refinancing. 🎓 Student Loan Calculator Monthly payment and total interest on student debt. 🗝️ Car Lease Calculator Estimate a monthly lease payment from the key terms. 🏡 Extra Mortgage Payment Calculator How extra payments cut mortgage interest and time. 🗓️ Biweekly Mortgage Calculator How biweekly payments shorten your mortgage. 📅 Amortization Schedule Calculator Yearly principal vs interest breakdown of any loan. 🧮 Debt Consolidation Calculator See if one consolidated loan beats your current debts. 🏦 Home Equity Calculator Your home equity and borrowable amount at a target LTV. 🏡 Home Affordability Calculator Max home price from your income using the 28/36 rule. 📍 Mortgage Points Calculator Whether paying points to lower your rate pays off. ⚖️ Loan Comparison Calculator Put two loan offers side by side to see the real cost. 🏡 Home Sale Proceeds Calculator Your net cash after paying off the mortgage and selling costs. 🧵 Blended Debt Interest Rate Calculator Weighted-average interest rate across all your debts. 🏦 How Much Can I Borrow Calculator Max loan a monthly payment can support. 💳 Credit Utilization Calculator Your credit utilization ratio and its score impact. 🚗 Lease vs Buy a Car Calculator Compare the true cost of leasing vs buying over the years you keep it. 🏡 Rent vs Buy a Home Calculator Compare renting vs buying by true net cost over the years you'll stay. ⚖️ Pay Off Debt vs Invest Calculator Should spare cash attack debt or go into investments? Compare net worth. 🏦 15 vs 30 Year Mortgage Calculator Compare payment, total interest, and investing the payment difference. 🚗 Auto Loan Calculator Monthly payment with trade-in value, sales tax, fees and any rolled-in loan balance. 💳 Balance Transfer Calculator 0% promo vs staying on your current card — fee included, with the payment that clears it in time. 🏦 HELOC Calculator How big a credit line your equity supports, and payments in both phases — including the jump. ⚖️ ARM vs Fixed Mortgage Calculator 5/7/10-year ARM vs 30-year fixed over the years you'll actually keep the loan — with the cap-out worst case. 🚪 PMI Calculator Your monthly PMI, total cost, and the three dates it can end — including the appreciation shortcut. 🔑 Closing Costs Calculator Itemized buyer closing costs and total cash to close — lender, title, escrow and prepaids. 📉 Mortgage Recast Calculator What a lump sum + re-amortization does to your payment — vs just prepaying, vs refinancing. 🎓 Student Loan Refinance Calculator New rate vs old: monthly and lifetime savings — and the federal protections a refi permanently burns.

Income & Budgeting 21

💰 Salary to Hourly Calculator Convert annual salary to hourly, weekly and monthly pay. 🧾 Take-Home Pay Estimator Estimate net monthly pay from gross salary and tax rates. 💸 50/30/20 Budget Calculator Split your take-home pay into needs, wants and savings. 🛟 Emergency Fund Calculator Size your emergency fund and see how long it takes to build. 🎈 Inflation Calculator See what today's money will be worth in the future. 📋 Net Worth Calculator Add up what you own, subtract what you owe. 📆 Hourly to Salary Calculator Convert an hourly wage into weekly, monthly and yearly pay. 🏡 Rent Affordability Calculator A sensible rent range based on your income. ⏰ Overtime Pay Calculator Total weekly pay including overtime at any multiplier. 💵 Paycheck Calculator Gross and net pay per paycheck by pay frequency. 📈 Pay Raise Calculator New pay after a raise, and if it beats inflation. 💹 Savings Rate Calculator Your savings rate and what it means for freedom. 📈 Rent Increase Calculator New rent after an increase, and if it's fair. 📉 Salary Inflation Calculator Whether your salary has kept pace with inflation. 🚗 Commute Cost Calculator Yearly cost of commuting, including the value of your time. 🛩️ Savings Runway Calculator Months your savings would cover with no income. 💰 Salary Gross-Up Calculator The gross salary needed to net a target take-home. 💰 Bonus Tax Calculator Bonus withholding (22% federal + FICA + state) and what you truly owe at tax time. 🛡️ Life Insurance Needs Calculator Coverage sized from your debts, income, kids and savings — not a salesperson's rule of thumb. 👶 Daycare vs Staying Home Calculator Second paycheck minus childcare, taxes and work costs — the honest hourly wage that's left. 📦 RSU Tax Calculator Vest-day tax at your real bracket vs the 22% withheld — and the April surprise in between.

Taxes & Shopping 8

🧾 Sales Tax Calculator Add sales tax to a price, or back it out of a total. 🏷️ Discount Calculator Final price after a percentage off, and what you save. 🍽️ Tip Calculator Work out the tip and split a bill between people. 🧾 VAT Calculator Add VAT to a net price or extract it from a gross price. 📈 Capital Gains Tax Calculator Estimate tax owed and net profit on an investment sale. 🧾 Tax Bracket Calculator (2025) Your marginal bracket, effective rate and tax bill under the 2025 federal brackets. 🗓️ Quarterly Estimated Tax Calculator Your four payment amounts and due dates — safe-harbor prior-year method vs 90% of this year. 🧾 Tax Withholding Calculator Project your year-end refund or bill from a pay stub, and the exact W-4 line that fixes it.

Business 11

⚖️ Break-Even Point Calculator How many sales cover your costs — the first business question. 📉 Profit Margin Calculator Margin, markup and profit from cost and price. 🧑‍💻 Freelance Hourly Rate Calculator Turn a target income into the hourly rate you must charge. 🏷️ Markup Calculator Set a selling price from cost and desired markup. 🎯 LTV : CAC Ratio Calculator Lifetime value vs acquisition cost — is growth healthy? 🚀 Startup Runway Calculator Months of cash left from burn rate and balance. ⏳ Payback Period Calculator Time for an investment to recoup its cost. 📐 EBITDA Calculator EBITDA and margin from your income statement. 🏘️ Rental Property ROI Calculator Cap rate, cash flow and cash-on-cash return. 🧑‍💻 Self-Employment Tax Calculator SE tax, the half-deduction, income tax estimate and your quarterly payment. 🧰 Solo 401(k) vs SEP IRA Calculator Max contributions to each from your self-employment profit — and why the solo 401(k) usually wins.

Everyday Math 3

🔢 Percentage Calculator Three everyday percentage questions in one tool. ⛽ Fuel Cost Calculator Cost of a trip, and yearly fuel spend. 🛒 Unit Price Calculator Find the real cost per unit and the better deal.
FinCalc Lab

Free, fast and honest financial calculators. All tools run entirely in your browser — we never see or store your numbers.

About Methodology Contact Privacy Policy Terms of Use

© 2026 FinCalc Lab. All calculators and articles are for educational purposes only and do not constitute financial advice. Consult a qualified professional before making financial decisions.
